name: @pipobscure/sea-test
description: Test SEA application using the zip and vfs mounting feature.
author: Philipp Dunkel <pip@pipobscure.com>

scripts.archive: node --no-warnings lib/app.js create --base lib/ --prefix shell-base --key certs/leaf.key --chain certs/chain.pem < app.manifest > app.run && chmod 0755 app.run
scripts.executable: node --no-warnings lib/app.js create --base lib/ --prefix node-base --key certs/leaf.key --chain certs/chain.pem < app.manifest > app.sea && chmod 0755 app.sea
